body_excerpt: In nf_conntrack_helper_q931 of nf_conntrack_h323_main.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not required for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In nf_conntrack_helper_q931 of nf_conntrack_h323_main.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional exec
